params.name: page[offset]
params.description: The offset for pagination (number of records to skip)

params.name: page[limit]
params.description: Maximum number of records to return per page (max 10)

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort field and direction. Prefix with - for descending order. Example: -dateCreated, name, -dateUpdated

params.name: filter.loTypes
params.description: Comma-separated list of learning object types to filter by

params.name: filter.catalogIds
params.description: Comma-separated list of catalog IDs to filter by

params.name: filter.skillName
params.description: Filter by skill name

params.name: filter.tagName
params.description: Filter by tag name

params.name: filter.loState
params.description: Filter by learning object state

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include. Valid values: instances, enrollment, skills, subLOs, prerequisiteLOs, supplementaryResources, authors, catalogLabels

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of learning objects available to the authenticated user. Learning objects include courses, learning programs, certifications, and job aids. Supports filtering by type, catalog, skill, tag, and status.

info.name: Adobe Captivate Get a Learning Object

params.name: learningObjectId
params.description: The unique identifier of the learning object (format: course:XXXXXX, learningProgram:XXXXXX, certification:XXXXXX, or jobAid:XXXXXX)

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of related resources to include in the response

items.docs: Retrieves a single learning object by its ID, including its metadata, instances, and relationships. The response follows JSON:API format with optional included resources.

info.name: Adobe Captivate List Instances of a Learning Object

params.name: learningObjectId
params.description: The unique identifier of the learning object (format: course:XXXXXX, learningProgram:XXXXXX, certification:XXXXXX, or jobAid:XXXXXX)

params.name: page[offset]
params.description: The offset for pagination (number of records to skip)

params.name: page[limit]
params.description: Maximum number of records to return per page (max 10)

items.docs: Retrieves all instances associated with a learning object. Each instance represents a specific offering of the course with its own enrollment deadline, completion deadline, and seat limit.

params.name: query
params.description: The search query string

params.name: filter.loTypes
params.description: Comma-separated list of learning object types to search

params.name: filter.catalogIds
params.description: Comma-separated list of catalog IDs to search within

params.name: page[offset]
params.description: The offset for pagination (number of records to skip)

params.name: page[limit]
params.description: Maximum number of records to return per page (max 10)

items.docs: Performs a text-based search across learning objects. Returns matching courses, learning programs, certifications, and job aids based on the search query. Supports pagination and filtering by learning object type and catalog.

params.description: The offset for pagination (number of records to skip)

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of users in the account. Supports filtering by role, active status, and user group. Only accessible by admin and integration admin roles.

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of enrollments. Can be scoped to the authenticated user or to all users (admin only). Supports filtering by learning object ID, state, and date range.
Enrolls a user in a learning object instance. The request must specify the learning object instance and the user to enroll.

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of bulk import/export jobs. Jobs support operations such as user import via CSV, learner transcript export, and training report export.

Retrieves the account configuration and details for the authenticated user's Learning Manager account, including timezone, locale, and enabled features.
